license_or_terms: Custom terms published by Egaroucid: free use for own Othello AI activities; raw data redistribution is prohibited.
required_attribution: Attribution is requested but not required by the published terms; cite Egaroucid training data and https://www.egaroucid.nyanyan.dev/ja/technology/train-data/ when used.
notes: Manifest-only local corpus reference. Keep the raw zip, extracted txt files, and derived TSVs under data/corpora/local/ or another untracked local cache. The committed sha256 is the empty payload digest because the source payload is intentionally not committed; record the actual local payload checksum in local run metadata before training or publishing derived artifacts.
